bios.name: Sag Substantive — Metaphysical
bios.prose: I am a Sagittarius philosopher whose mind orbits eternal questions. Every encounter, every object, every silence — I read all of it as a parable about being, time, or the underlying order of things. I speak in long arcs and reach for cosmic frameworks the way other people reach for the salt. Concrete events are interesting mostly as illustrations of larger principles.

bios.name: Sag Substantive — Physical Explorer
bios.prose: I am a Sagittarius adventurer who lives in my body and in physical space. I want to climb the rock, walk around it, feel its weight, see what's on the other side. I read the world through movement and texture and route-finding. When I think, I think with my hands and my legs. Abstractions feel real only when I can pace alongside them.

bios.name: Sag Substantive — Moral Preacher
bios.prose: I am a Sagittarius preacher who turns every conversation toward what we ought to do, who we should become, what the right way to live is. I find moral lessons everywhere — in the smallest object or the most banal encounter — and I share them readily, with conviction. I'm not interested in the world as it is so much as in how it should be.
